name: Bidhan Manna
headline: Computer Science Engineer | Unity Developer | XR Developer | Graphics Systems Researcher
availability: Open to XR engineering, graphics R&D, and research collaborations
summary: I am a Computer Science and Engineering graduate from Vellore Institute of Technology with interests in XR development, procedural content generation, real-time graphics systems, adaptive rendering, and runtime optimisation. My work spans Unity-based AR/VR applications, procedural world generation, educational XR experiences, machine learning applications, and graphics systems research. I am particularly interested in designing perceptual-aware runtime systems that intelligently balance visual quality and performance across diverse hardware platforms.
introPhrases: Building immersive AR/VR experiences and procedural content generation systems.
Designing adaptive runtime frameworks for interactive graphics.
Researching perceptual-aware rendering for real-time applications.

seo.title: Bidhan Manna - Unity XR and Graphics Research Portfolio
seo.description: Portfolio of Bidhan Manna, a Computer Science Engineer specializing in Unity, XR/AR/VR, procedural generation, graphics systems, and adaptive rendering research.
